mutually_exclusive.note: The form says '“X” the court for filing' — exactly one court box.
A hearing time is AM or PM, not both.
The form says 'Choose one:' — more days to pay in full or a new payment plan, not both.
A new payment plan names one frequency: every week, two weeks, or month.
